source.book: 《9分达人雅思听力真题还原及解析6》

segments.text: On behalf of our Community Centre, I'd like to welcome you all here today.
segments.translation: 我谨代表我们社区中心，欢迎大家今天来到这里。

segments.text: My name is Mary Lyndon.
segments.translation: 我叫玛丽·林登。

segments.text: As you can see here, this multi-purpose hall is a great venue for various events, including banquets, seminars or dances.
segments.translation: 大家可以看到，这个多功能厅是举办各类活动的绝佳场地，包括宴会、研讨会或者舞会。

segments.text: The centre provides services for all ages.
segments.translation: 中心为各个年龄段的人提供服务。

segments.text: As the majority of you have already signed up for our dance workshops, I'll introduce relevant information first before we start the tour and get ourselves oriented.
segments.translation: 由于你们大多数人已经报名了我们的舞蹈工作坊，我先介绍一下相关信息，然后咱们再开始参观、熟悉一下环境。

segments.text: OK, now when participants check in for their first dancing session, they will be given a class list printed with available seasonal classes ranging from Zumba to Ballet as well as detailed descriptions and schedules.
segments.translation: 好，现在，学员来参加第一次舞蹈课签到时，会拿到一张课程单，上面印着当季可选的课程，从尊巴到芭蕾都有，还附有详细的介绍和课表。

segments.text: The dance studio will also give you a complimentary shoe bag to store your dance shoes.
segments.translation: 舞蹈工作室还会免费送你一个鞋袋，用来装你的舞鞋。

segments.text: Every week will be a surprise in cardio movement.
segments.translation: 每周的有氧动作都会有惊喜。

segments.text: Our fitness professional will guide you through an upbeat, heart-pumping, lively dance class.
segments.translation: 我们的健身专家会带你上一堂节奏欢快、让心跳加速、充满活力的舞蹈课。

segments.text: Therefore it is highly advised to bring a face towel and a water bottle with you.
segments.translation: 所以强烈建议你随身带一条擦脸巾和一个水瓶。

segments.text: As things get mixed up easily, you might also want to attach a name tag to your belongings.
segments.translation: 因为东西很容易弄混，你可能还想给自己的物品贴个名牌。

segments.text: It will be sent to you by mail in advance.
segments.translation: 这个会提前邮寄给你。

segments.text: Now let us get a closer look at our dance workshops and its curriculum.
segments.translation: 现在，咱们来仔细看看我们的舞蹈工作坊和它的课程安排。

segments.text: There is a list of activities to participate during and after each session.
segments.translation: 每次课上和课后都有一系列可以参加的活动。

segments.text: You'll have the chance to make your own costume, but it won't be held until tomorrow.
segments.translation: 你会有机会亲手制作自己的服装，不过那要到明天才举办。

segments.text: You can also practice dance with music whenever the studio is available.
segments.translation: 只要工作室有空，你也可以随时跟着音乐练舞。

segments.text: In the first afternoon and evening of your dance class, there will be an introduction to the development of dance for the past few decades.
segments.translation: 在你舞蹈课的第一天下午和晚上，会有一个关于过去几十年舞蹈发展的介绍。

segments.text: Then we'll warm up with an informal dance.
segments.translation: 然后我们会用一场非正式的舞蹈来热身。

segments.text: I know you don't have much experience in dancing but we'll get there soon.
segments.translation: 我知道你们跳舞经验不多，但我们很快就能上手的。

segments.text: Rest assured, there won't be a dance test until the end of the course.
segments.translation: 放心，要到课程结束时才会有舞蹈测试。

segments.text: OK, now a word about the layout of the centre.
segments.translation: 好，现在说说中心的布局。

segments.text: Our beautiful facility has 25 rooms altogether which are both very functional and aesthetically pleasing.
segments.translation: 我们这座漂亮的场馆一共有25个房间，既非常实用又赏心悦目。

segments.text: We are standing here, right at the entrance.
segments.translation: 我们现在站的地方，正好在入口处。

segments.text: To your left you can see two rooms in a row.
segments.translation: 在你左手边，可以看到一排两个房间。

segments.text: After each dance session, you are probably soaking in sweat and in desperate need of a shower.
segments.translation: 每次舞蹈课结束后，你可能浑身是汗，特别想冲个澡。

segments.text: Just go straight ahead, turn left, and the shower room is on your left-hand side.
segments.translation: 只要一直往前走，左转，淋浴间就在你左手边。

segments.text: If you just want to take a nap, there is a six-bed bunkroom.
segments.translation: 如果你只想小睡一会儿，这里有一间六张床的多铺位宿舍。

segments.text: It's immediately to the left of where you are standing, right before the shower room.
segments.translation: 它就在你现在站的位置左手边，正好在淋浴间前面。

segments.text: We also have a games room with dartboards, table tennis, pool and card games.
segments.translation: 我们还有一间娱乐室，配有飞镖靶、乒乓球、台球和纸牌游戏。

segments.text: It is a good place to have fun with friends.
segments.translation: 这是跟朋友一起玩乐的好地方。

segments.text: Just take the first right; it is the second area to your right.
segments.translation: 在第一个路口右转就到了；它在你右手边的第二个区域。

segments.text: You can explore it well later during our tour.
segments.translation: 待会儿参观的时候你可以好好逛逛。

segments.text: Further ahead in the corner there are the bike racks.
segments.translation: 再往前走，在拐角处有自行车停放架。

segments.text: You can either park your bike here or hire one if you want a ride.
segments.translation: 你可以把自行车停在这里，想骑车的话也可以租一辆。

segments.text: The first hour is free.
segments.translation: 第一个小时是免费的。

segments.text: Part of our dance sessions will take place in the music room.
segments.translation: 我们有一部分舞蹈课会在音乐室进行。

segments.text: It has a large mirror with various musical instruments and state-of-the-art stereos.
segments.translation: 里面有一面大镜子，配有各种乐器和最先进的音响。

segments.text: If you want to get there, just go straight, take the second right, and it's the second area to your left.
segments.translation: 如果你想去那儿，就一直走，在第二个路口右转，它在你左手边的第二个区域。

segments.text: Our friendly reception team is an invaluable resource for any visitor to the centre.
segments.translation: 我们友好的前台团队对来中心的每一位访客来说都是宝贵的资源。

segments.text: If your mobile phone needs charging, we have several adapters and can easily get your phone back up and running again.
segments.translation: 如果你的手机需要充电，我们有好几种转接头，能轻松让你的手机重新用起来。

segments.text: We also offer a range of chargeable services including photocopy, scanning and faxing.
segments.translation: 我们还提供一系列收费服务，包括复印、扫描和传真。

segments.text: The reception is located in the centre, to the south of the music room.
segments.translation: 前台位于中心区域，在音乐室的南面。

segments.text: There is a medical centre providing a full spectrum of care and treatment, especially for sports injuries like a sprained knee.
segments.translation: 这里有一个医疗中心，提供全方位的护理和治疗，尤其是像扭伤膝盖这类运动损伤。

segments.text: It's right opposite the reception, to the left of the music room.
segments.translation: 它正好在前台对面，在音乐室的左边。

segments.text: Now, I have to tell you about our gym where some of our dance sessions take place.
segments.translation: 现在，我得跟你们讲讲我们的健身房，我们有一些舞蹈课就在那里上。

segments.text: It is also equipped with the latest equipment, including exercise bikes, treadmills, rowing machines, etc.
segments.translation: 它也配备了最新的设备，包括健身单车、跑步机、划船机等等。

segments.text: If you walk straight ahead before you come to the end and turn right, it's the second room to your left.
segments.translation: 如果你一直往前走，快到尽头时右转，它就是你左手边的第二个房间。

segments.text: And speaking of food, if you ever feel hungry, you can either cook in the kitchen or grab a snack at the store.
segments.translation: 说到吃的，如果你饿了，可以在厨房自己做饭，或者在小卖部买点零食。

segments.text: To reach it, keep straight on until you get to the third passageway, turn right, and it's the one after the gym.
segments.translation: 去那儿的话，一直往前走，走到第三个通道右转，它就在健身房过去那间。

segments.text: And the kitchen sits right next to the gym on the same side of the passageway.
segments.translation: 厨房就紧挨着健身房，在通道的同一侧。

segments.text: It has all the utensils you'll need, spatulas, frying pans, ladles and plates, you name it.
segments.translation: 里面你需要的厨具一应俱全，锅铲、煎锅、汤勺、盘子，应有尽有。

segments.text: Just feel free to use it.
segments.translation: 尽管随意使用。

segments.text: By the way, if you have coats, umbrellas or any large bags with you, the cloakroom is available.
segments.translation: 对了，如果你带了外套、雨伞或者什么大包，可以用寄存处。

segments.text: It's the room in the top right corner on the far side.
segments.translation: 它是最里面右上角的那个房间。

segments.text: Right, well, if you're ready, we'll start the tour of our lovely community centre.
segments.translation: 好，那么如果大家准备好了，我们就开始参观我们可爱的社区中心吧。
